title: Captions
description: Anchor-based caption set per D4. Caption-writer owns (text, mood, anchor_event_id, intent_duration); composition-director derives absolute (start, end, duck_window) at compose time. No absolute timestamps live here.

intent_duration.description: Author-intended on-screen duration in seconds. Composition may shift the start window for audio mixing but should respect this duration within tolerance.

anchor_offset.description: Seconds relative to the anchor event. Negative = before, positive = after.

priority.description: 1 = nice-to-have, 5 = must-show. Composition drops lower-priority captions if a window collides.
